articles.description: Biggest worries probably won’t come as a surprise

articles.title: Government likely to slow E25 petrol rollout after concerns over E20 transition: Report
articles.description: The Centre is learnt to favour a graded transition as automakers and motorists raise concerns over mileage and vehicle compatibility.

articles.title: Oil price today: Crude benchmarks inch higher as focus shifts to supply, demand and Hormuz shipments
articles.description: International Business News: Oil prices inched higher on Tuesday as traders are now focused on supply demand and recovering shipments across the crucial Strait of Hormuz. Around 7.

articles.title: Oil prices gain as focus shifts to supply recovery and demand
articles.description: Oil prices saw slight gains Tuesday as traders focused on supply increases. Traders are looking beyond Middle East tensions to demand prospects. The United Arab Emirates increased crude output significantly in June. Saudi Arabia also cut its August crude selling price to Asia. Market watchers await demand response, especially from China.

articles.title: Electric vehicle sales are on a fast track: war has done what policy couldn't
articles.description: Recent data for retail automobile offtake shows robust demand overall, but gains made by vehicles that don’t run on petrol-station refills stand out. How long will the West Asian war’s propulsion last?

articles.title: Tata Punch tops India's June 2026 sales with petrol, CNG and EV options
articles.description: Tata Motors' Punch, including its electric version, emerged as India's best-selling passenger vehicle in June 2026. Offered with petrol, CNG and EV powertrains, the micro SUV now boasts one of the widest powertrain choices and feature lists in its segment.

articles.title: Crude oil prices rise on hopes of stronger demand; Brent above $72 per barrel
articles.description: US-Iran war: Brent crude futures rose 28 cents, or 0.39%, to $72.29 a barrel, while US West Texas Intermediate (WTI) crude climbed 29 cents, or 0.26%, to $68.84 a barrel.

articles.title: Oil prices gain as focus shifts to supply recovery and demand
articles.description: OIL prices edged higher on Tuesday, but gains were limited as traders looked beyond easing geopolitical tensions in the Middle East and turned their attention to supply increases and demand prospects.

articles.title: Inflation eases to 6.4% in June 2026 as fuel, food prices cool
articles.description: Though lower domestic oil prices and cheaper major food items have pushed inflation down, it remains well above the government’s target range of 2% to 4%
